---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A short, one-sentence description of what you'd like.

## Problem / motivation

Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the use case this would enable. Why is the current behaviour insufficient?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible:
- New env vars or config options
- API changes (new endpoints, new JSON-RPC methods, new tool parameters)
- Behaviour changes

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered and why they don't fully address the need.

## Additional context

Links to relevant MCP spec sections, related issues, or example use cases.
